ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* Full address of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., primary, secondary, high school, etc.) */,
  "school_district" TEXT /* School district information */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the school is located */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of enrolled students */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tuition_costs" (
  "tuition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tuition record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the tuition costs */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year for which the tuition costs are applicable */,
  "in_state_cost" REAL /* Cost for in-state students */,
  "out_state_cost" REAL /* Cost for out-of-state students */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tuition cost record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tuition cost record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tuition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tuition_costs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year of enrollment data */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Count of enrolled students for that year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollment_history_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., enrollment, tuition) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned to the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the assignment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
